title: 02.11.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: February 11, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and
Code Enforcement Service Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic
Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for January 30, 2026
through February 5, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering the period of January 30 through February 5, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requests by reference number, date, requester, and category.
fields.key_stats: The visible portion of the public records log (pages 1–3 of 15) shows at least 21 Police Department Records requests, at least 15 Fire Department Records requests (all from CRU LexisNexis on 2/1/2026), and at least 14 General Public Records requests submitted between January 30 and February 1, 2026. Common request categories include Police Reports, Background Requests, FBI NICS, Body Worn Camera Video, Traffic Accidents, 911 Transcripts/Logs, Building Plans/Permits, and Fire Incident Reports.
